holdings.name: Sun Pharmaceuticals
holdings.description: India's largest pharma company and top 5 globally in specialty. Dermatology (Winlevi, Cequa), oncology and ophthalmics drive US margins of 30%+. 40 manufacturing facilities globally. Ilumya (US) and Levulan ramp the specialty pipeline.

holdings.name: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise
holdings.description: India's largest private hospital chain. 70+ hospitals, 10,000+ beds. Apollo 24|7 telemedicine platform: 50M+ users. Medical tourism leader (25%+ market share in international patients to India). Pharmacy chain Apollo Pharmacy — 6,000+ outlets.

holdings.name: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories
holdings.description: Among India's top 3 pharma exporters. Speciality generics in US, biosimilars in Europe and emerging markets. Revlimid (lenalidomide) AG deal and filgrastim biosimilar generating multi-year annuity cash flows.

holdings.name: Cipla
holdings.description: Pioneer of affordable branded generics. Inhalation therapy (Advair equivalents) for US, South Africa, India. Cipla Quality Chemical Industries (Africa) producing ARV drugs for PEPFAR. Strong ANDA pipeline with 30+ pending approvals.

holdings.name: Divi's Laboratories
holdings.description: India's dominant API (Active Pharmaceutical Ingredient) manufacturer. Contract manufacturing for top 10 global pharma cos (confidential). Divi's DSP division for complex chemistry. China+1 strategy accelerates order migration to Indian CDMOs.

holdings.name: Max Healthcare
holdings.description: North India's premium hospital operator (19 hospitals, 5,000+ beds). Revenue per bed growing due to complex surgeries, oncology and international patients. Saket and Patparganj campuses are tertiary care landmarks in Delhi NCR.
